title: BetterPaintings
description: Enhanced Default Minecraft Paintings for a Cleaner and Crisp look.
body:
🎨 BetterPaintings – Crystal Clear Minecraft Art!


Tired of blurry, pixelated paintings in Minecraft? 😫
BetterPaintings brings your in-game art to life by transforming the classic Minecraft paintings into sharper, clearer, and more vibrant versions! Every painting has been carefully upscaled and refined to make your worlds feel more immersive and polished.

✨ Features
 

Ultra-Crisp Textures: Every painting is improved from vanilla originals for a cleaner, sharper look.
Improved Clarity: Blurry and muddy images are gone — now you can enjoy every pixel in style.
Vanilla-Compatible: Works perfectly with all versions of Minecraft that support resource packs.
Lightweight & Optimized: No lag, no heavy files — just smooth, beautiful textures.
Supports Everything: Works perfectly with Fabric, Forge, NeoForge, OptiFine, Sodium, and more
Why You’ll Love It
Perfect for builders, interior designers, and art lovers in Minecraft.
Makes your walls, galleries, and houses pop with vibrant details.
Enhances your immersive experience without changing the original vibe of Minecraft.
Installation
Download the pack from CurseForge.

Then place it in your resourcepacks folder.

Activate it in Minecraft and enjoy your beautiful new paintings!
